entry.title: Re: Raise RAP Events in non-RAP Applications
entry.content:
Hi, thanks for the great blog post. I was looking for a way to send RAP events to event mesh from a non-RAP app and you describe how to do it.

Regards,
Jens

entry.title: Re: UDF Setup history item list BP ordered
entry.content:
Hi Mark,

yes for sure. The syntax is for using it as FMS. If you want to test a FMS. (Shift+F2 is a FMS)

Save the Query

Open the desirerd Form with data (sales order in that case which has a CardCode)

Then go through the menu to the query. The variable 

 

will be filled with CardCode

regards

entry.title: Re: OVP: Pie Chart Values rounding
entry.content: Solved by adding the DataPoint to the measure section in the annotation file.

entry.title: Re: Enable events from S/4HANA cloud to Event Mesh
entry.content: Detailed and much helpful blog. Thank you

entry.title: Code completion not working in Eclipse for CDS Built-in functions
entry.content: Hi. Good day. When using CDS built-in functions like decimal_shift, unit_conversion etc., code completion is not working in Eclipse. I tried selecting the signature by mouse click and also by Shift + Enter.

entry.title: Re: WWI / chapter 14 / 3E Template
entry.content:
Hello Christoph,

 

I assume you are referring to e.g. this part of the code:

 

<01GESTRAUTHG(M:C14N_SYMBOL_STACK_NEW)>

<11BRG013(M,SAP_EHS_1022_023;*)>

<11BRG014(S:CLASS;*;E:ZISI114C,ADR)>

<11BRG357(G,A:ADR,L:*;*)>

<11BRG015(M,SAP_EHS_1022_024;*)>

<13BNG016(+:01GEHSDGXFLT)>

<13BNG101(+:01G1022024D3(M:C14N_SYM_CHECK_FOR_YES),01GEST0DGTA)>

<13CNG101>

<01GESTRAUTHG(M:C14N_SYMBOL_STACK_PUSH)>

<13ENG101>

Here the authorization group is only used to have something written into the stack, as mark pointed out. Often it doesn't matter what is written onto the stack since we only need a distiction whether the stack is empty or filled. 

 

Best,


Ralph

entry.title: Re: Task 3 - Enhancing CDS View Entities with Annotations
Re: Adopting General Display Name
entry.content:
Hi Harvey,

I understand that General Display Name feature will be made universal by H1 2025.

Based on your explanation in the blog, it is require to configure Name Format in order for General Display Name to function properly.

However, refer to another KBA related to Name Format 2834005 - Formal Name does not update after enabling Name Format (sap.com), it is affecting Formal Name not being updated. We had the same issue and decided to remove the Name Format.

Can you confirm Name Format is required for General Display Name to work properly? If yes, how do we prevent Formal Name not being updated issue?

Appreciate your response.

Thanks & Regards,

May Leng

entry.title: Re: How to convert xml to table, using xml transformation, at utf-8 format.
entry.content:
Hi Shiz,

It may not help but you could try populating the itab with data and then converting it to XML. You could then look at the resulting XML for any "features" you may have overlooked. 😜

Cheers
Graham Robbo

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Business Partner - Influence Customer Number
entry.content:
This is a solution, if you are already on S/4. But if you prepare an ERP 6.0 system for a conversion to S/4, the synchronization to business partners is a prerequisite to even start the conversion. 

So what is the alternative solution on ERP 6.0 ?

After all enhancement point CVI_CUSTOM_MAPPER does also exist in ERP 6.0, why was this SAP-Note restricted to S/4 only?

entry.title: Re: Reuse of Calculated Columns in CDS-View
entry.content:
Hi,
I found a workaround (or if you want to call it "solution"). I am getting used to AI - should have tried before. Anyway, I have got a reply, explaining that what I want is not supported.
The solution / workaround is another CDS-View which nests the first one, as:

define view entity Z_I_Vbrk1 as
select from vbrk
{
  vbeln,
  netwr,
  mwsbk,
  netwr + mwsbk as total,
}

define view entity Z_I_Vbrk2 as
select from Z_I_Vbrk1 as
{
  vbeln,
  netwr,
  mwsbk,
  total,
  total * 1000 as total1000
  // ...further reuse of 'total' 
}

Not that I am happy, because this could mean a complex hierarchy of views, but so far this is the best I could find.

Cheers,

Igor

entry.title: Re: Reuse of Calculated Columns in CDS-View
entry.content: (how can I delete an accidentally created comment?)

entry.title: Letter can only be generated in document generation only post Event Reasons approval
entry.content:
Hi Community,

I hope this message finds you well.

The requirement here is that Letter can only be generated post Event Reasons approval.

Key Point:

  • Letter Generation: Letters, such as promotion letters, can only be generated after the Event Reasons, such as promotions, have been triggered & approved by the designated approvers.

Example:

  • A Promotion Letter will only be generated once the promotion has received the necessary approvals from the approvers. Any attempt to generate the letter before this approval will not be processed.

Kindly let us know the feasibility.

Thank you.

C.B

entry.title: Re: Authenticate via Basic Auth or Client Certificate aga...
entry.content:
Event-Driven Architectures (EDA) typically don't have point-to-point channels but leverage brokers to distribute and route events to interested parties.

SAP Cloud solutions can leverage the SAP Event Broker for SAP Applications to publish events centrally. This is done via the creation of formations, see here: https://help.sap.com/docs/btp/sap-business-technology-platform/enabling-events-exchange-between-sap-cloud-systems 

On the CAP side, where you'd subscribe to the events, development is ongoing to support the new SAP Event Broker for SAP Applications as additional broker next to the SAP Event Mesh. I suggest to keep an eye out for TechEd in October where the topic will be discussed and demonstrated, see: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=m_YoqkECnGI

entry.title: Implementing 72-Hour Escalation in SAP S4HC Purch Requisition Workflow (Not Just Email)
entry.content:
I am working on configuring Purchase Requisition (PREQN) workflows in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public environment and need some advice.

I have a specific requirement where, if a workflow remains idle without approval or rejection for 72 hours, it should automatically escalate to the next manager in the approval hierarchy—not just send an email notification, but actually move the workflow to the next level.

Is this at all possible ?

entry.title: Re: [video tutorial] SAP S/4HANA and SAP Integration Suite, Advanced Event Mesh (AEM) direct integra
entry.content: Very nicely explained with details - thanks @prashantrakheja

entry.title: SAP FSM stock transfer by technician without activity
entry.content:
Hello experts,

we have the following scenario: SAP FSM integrated with Pro Axia to SAP ECC

Technicians are using a lot of spare parts, which they keep in their van stock. There is a requirement to have a certain amount of spare parts always available, so the technician should have the option to make a stock transfer in the app to refill his spare parts without an activity related to it.

Our reqired scenario would be then:

  1. Technician checks current stock of his spare parts
  2. Spare parts amount to low, technician wants to do a stock transfer
  3. Requested spare parts are sent to technician
  4. Technician updates his van stock upon arrival of spare parts to confirm he received the spare parts

Right now we dont see any option to trigger a stock transfer by a technician without an acitivity.

Any ideas?

Thank you and best regards,

Max

entry.title: Re: BPC 10.1 MS ERROR 403 AFTER MIGRATION
entry.content:
Make sure all the services are active.  Using SICF check following are active.

/default_host/sap/bc/ui5_ui5/sap/bpcwebclient

/default_host/sap/EPM_BPC

Using SE38, run the report, UJS_ACTIVATE_CONTENT

entry.title: Re: 3E WWI Template / Chapter 14
entry.content:
Hello Christoph,

Identifiers usually don't have a usage. In some cases, though, e.g. in dangerous goods questions, they may have a regulatory ist assigned since the names for the different DG regulations may differ. So Chapter 14 usually checks which regulation is currently active and then selects the right identifier based n the regulatory list assigned.

 

Best regards,

Ralph

entry.title: HANA Public Cloud in Substitution ( Precondition field / Function how we can add Assets table )
entry.content:
Hello ,

We need to create a custom substitution in HANA Public cloud ( App Mange Substitution & Validation ) and business requested to create below logic for  substitution.

Precondition ( Field / Function ) 

ANLB-BUKRS = '1234 AND ( ANLB-AFABE = '09' OR
ANLB-AFABE = '90' OR ANLB-AFABE = '91' ) AND
SYST-TCODE = 'AS01'

Substitution 

Scrap value   Constant = 30 ( Value )

Pls let us know how we can achieve above substitution in HANA Public cloud.

Thank 

JP

entry.title: SAP Inside Track Vienna 2024 - Call For Speakers is now OPEN!!
entry.content:
After a long hiatus, the SAP Inside Track Vienna is BACK!!

The SAP Inside Track Vienna is a fantastic chance to share insights, exchange experiences, and connect with fellow SAP enthusiasts. We invite everyone to join our Call For Speakers and showcase their expertise. Whether you're an SAP guru, developer, consultant, architect or user, we’d love to hear from you!
Please see here for further details and for our guidelines regarding the submission process.

Interested in sponsoring the event? Have a look at our sponsoring options here.

Let's us make this a great and memorable event!

See you soon!
- the SITVIE team

entry.title: Customize hotfolder AOP in Hybris
entry.content:
I am trying to customize the HEADER_TRANSFORMED step of hotfolder processing. I want to use my own class instead of using the OOTB ImpexTransformerTask:

 

<aop:around method="aroundTransform"
            pointcut="execution(* de.hybris.platform.acceleratorservices.dataimport.batch.task.ImpexTransformerTask.execute(..)) and args(header)"/>

I created my own aop.xml (with the pointcut now using my custom method) which I imported as resource in the xxx-spring.xml. However, it is still the OOTB ImpexTransformerTask that ends up being called. Am I missing some step?

Thank you!

entry.title: Can someone please provide step by step process of archiving business partner in S4HANA cloud?
entry.content:
Hi Team,


Can someone please explains the process of archiving the business partner in cloud?

Also, please explain EOP, residence and retention periods.

Thanks,

Rushi

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to run a program or background job only on individual PC?
entry.content:
If you don't want the user to start anything via SAP GUI, there are ONLY two solutions according to me:

  1. Create a non-ABAP program, stores it on the user's laptop, make it start automatically when the user starts the laptop.
  2. Theoretically, I think it's possible to make the user's laptop known in the network with a fixed IP address or whatever, and the ABAP server could try to connect to it, as if the user's laptop is a server. Ask network people.

I think I have helped the maximum I could. Good luck.

entry.title: Implications moving from Mainland to DAFZA from S2P perspective in SAP
entry.content: From SAP prospective what are the implications  if a company moved from Mainland in UAE to Free zone, how would it affect it from supplier certifications perspective?

entry.title: Re: Enabling In-Order processing with SAP Integration Suite, advanced event mesh Partitioned Queues
entry.content: @enricobarsali let's say G1 is blocked in partition 1 at the head of the queue and H1 & H2 are piled behind G1. In this case, there are redelivery attempts on the queue and after those attempts are exhausted the message can be moved to Dead Message Queue (DMQ) for manual intervention. This will unblock the head of the queue and H1 & H2 will be processed. There is also Time to Live (TTL) on the queue. After TTL expiry the message will be moved to DMQ unblocking the main queue. There are various strategies to ensure event processing stays unblocked.

entry.title: Re: Welcome to our Business Transformation Champions Group - the one and only transformation communi
entry.content: This initiative has piqued my interest, and I eagerly anticipate tracking its development here. The subject at hand holds the remarkable potential to not only sharpen competitive edge and bolster market position but also to significantly boost operational efficiency and agility. It's an endeavor that promises to drive innovation, elevate the customer experience, and further digitization and technological progress. All of these elements combined lay a robust foundation for sustainable growth and enduring success.

entry.title: Re: XMLHttpRequest request from crm.ondemand.com to origi...
entry.content: Hi, did You find a solution?

entry.title: 🟠 Create an SAP Fiori application based on an ABAP Business Object (BO) with SAP Build Code
entry.content:
In this session, you will develop an SAP Fiori application based on an SAP Business Object (BO) using SAP Build Code.
Creating custom services from BO enhances the potential functional scope of your BTP extension.
You will explore the various SAP Business Objects from SAP S/4HANA using Service Center in SAP Build Code, create a custom UI service from the BO and consume the newly created service in an SAP Fiori application.

entry.title: Re: Enabling In-Order processing with SAP Integration Suite, advanced event mesh Partitioned Queues
entry.content: @Vidyadhar_Kothekar ok but let's continue with your case. G1 is moved in DMQ after TTL. Then problems on receiver are solved so queue is able to process messages. In this case G2, H1 and H2 are processed but the sequence on G is lost and the receiver gets H1 and H2 that are no more required as H transactions were already made manually.

entry.content:
Hi,

We have a requirement to decrypt the header variable in SAP BTP APIM and generate the JWT token using the decrypted variable. Is there any best practise to use decryption in SAP BTP APIM?

entry.title: Re: SAC - Widget with separate filters
entry.content:
Hi FrancescoPetrocelli, 

  As you want to have only ONE page, instead of using story filter, I would recommend you use page filter. With page filter, you can easily define which widget it links to. 

Best regards, William

entry.title: Re: How can you tell when a customers name and address has been changed?
entry.content:
Hello Stephen

Info on what is registered as a change in the Bus.Partner-area and more can be found in SAP-KBA 3411039 - FAQ: Change History Display for Business Partners - SAP for Me (for instance : check report "BUSCHDOC").

Judging by your question, why not consider using a BAdI in the Address related area to influence the formatting? If might be possible to use the "ADDRESS_CHECK" BAdI or any other related BAdI upon a change of the Address / Communication data ...

Hope this helps

Nic T.

entry.title: SAP Customers Conversations Event: SAP S/4HANA public cloud @ Zelestra
entry.content:
Dear Utilities Community

We are pleased to invite you to our upcoming Customer Conversations LIVE Event with Zelestra about their Grow with SAP journey. In this session Borja Guerrero, Chief Digital Officer from our customer Zelestra is going to discuss how they leverage the capabilities of SAP to sustain growth.

In this webinar, our experts will discuss advanced features and best practices for SAP covering a range of topics including:

- Project overview
- Benefits gained
- Lessons learned
- Demo of the system
- Q&A session with participants

Whether you are a long-time SAP user looking to optimize your system or you are considering an SAP implementation for the first time, this webinar will provide you with valuable information to help you make the most of your investment.

Please register here

entry.title: E2E Use Case: Realizing a Data Product Architecture with SAP IT
entry.content:
Our mission in enterprise analytics is to empower every SAP employee to make AI-powered, data-driven decisions that drive innovation in our product portfolio, accelerate insights to action, and delight our customers. The SAP Datasphere Data Marketplace is the cornerstone of how we enable employees to access Data Products more quickly. 

In the 7th episode of the SAP Datasphere Data Marketplace demo series, we demonstrate a comprehensive end-to-end use case that illustrates how SAP implements a data product architecture. The use case is structured into four sequential steps, providing a overview of the entire process.

The Demo begins with finding the right data product in the Data Marketplace, followed by the installation and usage of that product. Next, the focus shifts to the SAP Catalog, demonstrating how data product consumers can benefit from the provided information. The fourth section dives into the modeling process, where existing data products are used to create derived data products for further analysis and reporting. 

Click here to watch the video!

The Demo shows how existing data products are combined and refined to create new, derived data products that enhance analysis and reporting capabilities. The use case is rooted in a CSRD reporting scenario, illustrating how SAP utilizes existing data products and enriches them with additional information to meet specific reporting requirements.

Enjoy watching!

entry.title: PO to show next price break quantity on item from SPP2 shows 'Invalid numeric value' error if > 1k
entry.content:
Hi All,

I've created a UDF on marketing document rows to show the next quantity price break on each item if it exists.
This works as needed up until the next quantity price break is 1,000 or more.
How can I amend the FMS too ignore the comma in the number format?

 

SELECT T0.[Amount] FROM SPP2 T0 WHERE T0.[ItemCode] =$[$38.1.0] and  T0.[CardCode] =$[$4.1.0] and  T0.[Amount] > $[$38.11.number]

 

 Screenshot showing the Volume Discounts format of the price breaks and the PO with the error.

Any advice is appriceated. Thanks.

EDIT;
I've just realised it is the UDF that is causing this, it is set as numeric type.
Manually typing 1000 is fine, while entering 1,000 shows same error.
Do I then need to set a new UDF as Alphanumeric or can the FMS be changed to remove the comma before?

entry.title: Re: SAP Inside Track Munich 2024 (#sitMUC) - Secure Your Spot Now!
entry.content:
Hi @Joel_John ,

did you click the registration directly after you've logged in? I've just tested on my own and it worked just fine.

Best Regards
Gregor

entry.title: Re: [BYD] How to block Ship-to Location related 2408 Upda...
entry.content: Dear Sir/Madam, I have discussed the new feature with the development team. It is for the planning area in the Planning tab of the product master. In previous releases, if a blocked planning area was selected as the ship-to site/location, an error would prevent the user from creating a stock transfer order. However, in the 2408 release, this error has been changed to an alert. As a result, users can now create stock transfer orders even with a blocked planning area, allowing for greater business flexibility. Best regards, Gavan SAP Technical Support, Public Cloud ERP

I can't build my app and it's been at least 3 days I think.

entry.title: Re: How to Block a Ship-to Location in SAP ByDesign
entry.content: Dear Sir/Madam, I have discussed the new feature with the development team. It is for the planning area in the Planning tab of the product master. In previous releases, if a blocked planning area was selected as the ship-to site/location, an error would prevent the user from creating a stock transfer order. However, in the 2408 release, this error has been changed to an alert. As a result, users can now create stock transfer orders even with a blocked planning area, allowing for greater business flexibility. Best regards, Gavan SAP Technical Support, Public Cloud ERP

entry.title: Re: Build your app (new UI)?
entry.content: Hi there - it should be fixed now. Might need to log in again, but please let me know if you are still seeing the same issue.

entry.title: Re: Unauthorised error while connecting to Built Process...
entry.content: Even after including the URL as per documentation ,receiving error as com.sap.it.rt.adapter.http.api.exception.HttpResponseException: An internal server error occured: HTTP operation failed invoking https://spa-api-gateway-bpi-eu-prod.cfapps.eu10.hana.ondemand.com/public/workflow/rest/v1/workflow-instances with statusCode: 415.

entry.title: Re: Build your app (new UI)?
entry.content:
The Free Tier requires signing up for a global account with BTP, which looking something like this process: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HQupwzu9-3s

Build Apps free edition only requires a simple form with email address/location when you are signing up.

entry.title: Re: SAC - Widget with separate filters
entry.content:
Hi @FrancescoPetrocelli ,

while the answer from @William_Yu  is usally the perfect answer there may be a reason, why it´s really important for you to stick to story filters.

If you really want to stick to them, you could add a new model (pointing to the same data source as the one you are currently using) and then bind your "Volume Spedito" KPI Chart to this new model instead of the currently used one.

Please keep in mind, that for this second model none of the other story filters have any effect, unless you´re working with linked dimensions. So let´s say the filter "Divisone" should have effect on your table and your KPI, you´ll need to link those dimensions.

Last but not least: This solution might be slower, since with two models SAC surely will create another request to load the data for the KPI Tile.

Best regards,
Denis

entry.title: test portal
entry.content: AP Community Downtime Scheduled for This Weekend

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP How to test DESTINATION to S4/Hana on premise...
entry.content:
Please refer to documentation on how to go about it.

Gist is in package.json you will find a snippet similar to the following if you have service named API_BUSINESS_PARTNER using destination S4HANA:

 

    "API_BUSINESS_PARTNER": {
      "kind": "odata",
      "model": "srv/external/API_BUSINESS_PARTNER"
        "credentials": {
          "destination": "S4HANA",
          "path": "/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_BUSINESS_PARTNER"
        }
    }

 

change it to 

 

    "API_BUSINESS_PARTNER": {
      "kind": "odata",
      "model": "srv/external/API_BUSINESS_PARTNER",
      "[production]": {
        "credentials": {
          "destination": "S4HANA",
          "path": "/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_BUSINESS_PARTNER"
        }
      },
      "[development]": {
        "credentials": {
          "url": "http://S4HANA.dest/",
          "path": "/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_BUSINESS_PARTNER"
        }
      },

    }

entry.title: Update with isolation_level vs. select with lock
entry.content:
What is the better approach to synch the update between multiple clients, when each row represents a task:

    update first taskstable set P=... where P='' Option(isolation_level = 2)

or 

    select first ID from taskstable with (UPDLOCK) where P='';
and when doing the update based on ID    update taskstable set P=... where ID = ... 

or any other suggestions?

entry.content: Hi, is it possible to integrate it with the sourcing of the asset (PO, acc. assignment A) or is it not supported?

I did not use a template from store i just created the project in the lobby. I really do not know the fix for this since i am just starting.

entry.title: Re: Embedding Business Context with the SAP HANA Cloud, Vector Engine
entry.content: Nicely done!

entry.title: SAP BTP MTA for an Angular App
entry.content:
Hi,

we are currently working on a POC using Angular (UI5 Web Components) and Python on SAP BTP using a standalone app router.

We are currently struggling with creating a working MTA configuration. The plan is to have a angular frontend that sends request to a python microservice (which in turn calls other https enabled endpoints via destionations) and additionally we would like to directly call an S/4HANA OnPremise System using the SAP Cloud Connector with Principal propagation.

If we get this successfully up and running, we will create a series of blog posts on this.

Can anyone give us a sample MTA.yaml for an angular app and a python app using a standalone app router?

Thanks!

Best regards from Austria,

Martin

entry.title: Re: Smart table Header count showing wrong .
entry.content:
I'm posting this for future if any one face this issue. Check your manifest.js file "defaultCountMode" should be "Request". In my case it is different.

Thanks,

Siva Krishna Majji.

entry.title: Change to error message for SAP message MM_PUR_SES 036
entry.content:
HI Team, 

I would like to change the message MM_PUR_SES_036 from warning message to error message in S4 Hana Cloud Public Edition, could anyone advise how to proceed it. 

Thanks advance for your kind help and appreciated for any advice.
